text:
CelebritiesWorcester

Fresh from the Olympic Games in Paris, gold medallist Matt Richards was spotted enjoying a meal in a village pub.

Richards took photos with staff in The Swan at Martin Hussingtree near Worcester after enjoying a family meal on Saturday evening (August 10).

The Swan's manager, Maisey Prue, revealed she went to school with the 21-year-old Olympian - attending both St Peter's Droitwich and Droitwich Spa High School.

Miss Prue said: "It's brilliant to think that someone I went to school with has achieved something this big.

"He was absolutely lovely too - one of the most down to earth people I've met, and you could ask him anything."

Richardsreceived a hero's welcomeearlier on Saturday (August 10) as hundreds of neighbours and fans greeted him near his family home in Droitwich.

Miss Prue added: "He was telling us how welcoming everyone had been when he arrived home.

title: Paris Olympics star Matt Richards seen in pub near Worcester | Worcester News
description: Team GB swimmer Matt Richards, who won gold and silver at the Olympic Games, took photos with staff in The Swan at Martin Hussingtree, near…
